flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Paul Quinn College are 46% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($29.3k vs $53.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Paul Quinn College rose 81% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $12.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Paul Quinn College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (70.4% → 49.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Paul Quinn College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.7k → $13.5k).
